channel.title: Workflows on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Workflows on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Bot-created pull requests can run workflows if approved
item.description:
Pull requests created by github-actions[bot] can now run CI/CD workflows after a user approves them. The approval step is required as a security check before generated code is allowed to trigger workflows.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: commandline: Inside the Microsoft Agent Framework: How we designed a layered SDK
item.description:
Microsoft describes the Agent Framework as a layered SDK that supports different agent architectures. It highlights agent loops, workflows, and harnesses as the main building blocks for both simple assistants and more complex multi-agent systems.

  • Source: Microsoft Command Line Blog
